title: fees.rs module docstring cites sapling_bundle_count which is not in ZIP-317
description:
wallet/src/fees.rs:7 — the module docstring shows the logical_actions formula as:
  logical_actions = max(n_transparent_inputs, n_transparent_outputs)
                  + sapling_bundle_count * 2
                  + n_orchard_actions

The term 'sapling_bundle_count * 2' does not appear in ZIP-317. ZIP-317 §4 specifies:
  logical_actions = max(n_tin, n_tout) + n_spend_desc + n_output_desc + n_action_desc

The implementation does not use bundle counts either. Someone verifying the code against the docstring will find a discrepancy and doubt the whole module.

**Why:** The docstring appears to be a misremembering or mis-copy of the spec.
**How to apply:** Replace the formula in the docstring with the ZIP-317-verbatim form.
close_reason: Already resolved by nie-70e.1 fix: sapling_bundle_count removed from module docstring when the formula was corrected to max(n_sapling_spends, n_sapling_outputs).
